text:
I found a peculiar diary amongst my aunt's things. Entries were dated 1900. They seemed terribly odd.

One entry spoke of a winter afternoon: a golden retriever chasing squirrels. Another claimed a visit to an old mill. I felt compelled to read more.

It struck me—a dog's diary. I tucked it away. Months passed.

Then I went hiking.

There I found it.

A map. A small circle marked "here." On it...

A picture. A girl smiling.

That was me.

The dog.
